description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with clean, rectangular volumes and flat roofs. The structure is primarily white, with a central open courtyard or patio area that includes a small patch of green, possibly artificial turf or a garden. The layout is L-shaped, with one wing containing the main living spaces and the other likely housing bedrooms or private areas. There is a detached, organically shaped pool and a single palm tree, suggesting a warm climate setting. The windows are large and arranged asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and views. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and outdoor living.
description: A modern, white, flat-roofed bungalow with an L-shaped layout, central courtyard, detached pool, and palm tree, featuring large asymmetrical windows and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard, and the arrangement of the pool and palm tree in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the open courtyard, and the separation between the main structure and the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the full extent of the pool, and the palm tree, with less detail on the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the solid mass of the building, the pool, and the palm tree, with minimal visibility of the courtyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows facing courtyard and pool
